feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Process Orchestration
feed.subtitle: SAP Process Orchestration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: In NWDS when exporting mapping to spreadsheet the constant values are not visible
entry.content:
Hi All,

i am using NWDS mapping Export to spreadsheet and works fine however the constants show up as const() so the actual value is not visible.  What am i doing wrong?
In SapPoConst.jpg you can see part of the export and in SapPoVisual.jpg the actual definition from NWDS mapping visual editor.

Thx Danny.

entry.title: SAP PI - Determine the receiver based on Source FileName
entry.content:
Hi all,

Ive an issue regarding receiver determination based on a Source FileName.

Ive a file to file scenario without any ESR objects. 

The FileNames look like this:

CRM_12345_TimeStamp
CRM_<all Other Values>_TimeStamp

Based on the source FileName I need to send Files containing the value 12345 to Receiver 1 and all Files containing other values except 12345 to Receiver 2

I try this in the Iflow:

(ContextObject.FileName CP "*12345*") --> Reiceiver 1  --> This is working

(ContextObject.FileName != "*12345*") --> Reiceiver 2  --> This is NOT working

Ive red that (Not) Equal to with a Wilcard (*) is not working.

So what is the solution here? How can I achieve this and solve this issue?

Your help is appreciated,

Kind regards

John

entry.title: Hi, we are getting below error javax.net.ssl.SSLHandshakeException: sun.security.validator.Validator
entry.content:
Hi we are getting below error while uploading certificate in KX2 test system In SAP PI/PO.

Could you please suggest me to resolve the issue.

entry.title: REST API Call for downloading file
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on SAP PO 7.5 to download the file from AWS S3 bucket. so i have followed the blogs

(https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-download-a-file-from-amazon-s3-buckets/ba-p/13419722)

 

on the same and have used "GET" call instead of PUT and interface is OK and getting response 200 in the monitoring. the file is coming in the payload and i have to download this file in some NFS folder.

Could you please let me know how can i get this file in the NFS folder directly. please note i am not using request/response(Sync) call here.

 

thanks

entry.title: PI/PO7.5 Background Job Processing Monitor -User roles
entry.content:
Hi,

Q1. Can you please suggest the user roles to restrict EDIT access for 'Background Job Processing Monitor' in PI/PO message monitoring. 

Configuration and monitoring home-->Monitoring-->Adapter engine tab-->Background Job Processing Monitor: Process Jobs

the current roles assigned to user are: SAP_XI_DEVELOPER_J2EE , SAP_XI_MONITOR_J2EE,SAP_XI_SUPPORT_J2EE,SAP_XI_RWB_SERV_USER.

Q2: When assigned the NWA_Readonly role, I am still able to see the 'Identity Management' section (display) and the list of users created. I would like to restrict access to the 'Identity Management' option; please suggest ways to hide it so that the user cannot view the list of all users created. I tried using the 'SAP_JAVA_NWADMIN_CENTRAL/LOCAL_READONLY' roles, but they restrict access to many other tools as well. So, I want to use the NWA_READONLY role, but it should not show the 'Identity Management' section.

Thank you.

entry.title: route message from SAP PI to SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Hope you are doing well. 

i have requirement as from SAP outbound proxy is triggering and that interface name is same where same interface should trigger to SAP PI and SAP CPI based on the content condition from SAP.

which means in the content of the proxy sysname is coming where if sysname is "x" it should route to PI system, if sysname is "Y" it should route to SAP CPI. since same interface we are using i am unable to add it in sxmb_adm . can you please provide the options if any ?

 

Thanks & Regards

Madhu T

entry.title: SAP Process Integration (SAP PI PO) Local rule routing condition
entry.content:
Hello ,  

In integrated configuration , i have to add a condition like when zregiogroup = 'eng' or 'mech' and werks = 'p020' or 'p025' or 'p089' or... Then that needs to passed to receiver. Please find the attachment for reference. I'm not able to find the solution. Please help me!!

entry.title: Calling BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMIT from PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a question about calling BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMIT or BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK from SAP Process Orchestration 7.5

In my scenario, I am calling BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 from PO.
S4 will then respond with a message BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2.Response.
Based on this response, I should either call BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMIT or BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK from PO to S4.

How can this be achieved without using BPM?

entry.title: SAP PI - Huge messages are in Scheduled Status - Update the status
entry.content:
Hi Friends, 

Good day. 

In SAP PI (7.5) , Message Monitoring overview screen, huge messages count is shown under Scheduled column. When we click the count, there is no messages come. i.e. no messages are available.

Restarting the PI system also did not help to update the status of the messages (to move them to Cancelled). 

I get stuck how to clear these messages (to move them to cancelled status)

Please find the screen shot. Kindly clarify. 

Thank you.

Regards, 

Jegatheeswaran P.

entry.title: how to create data type ref to ddic strucure in PO
entry.content:
Dear PO expert,

i want to create data type ref to ddic table structure, e.g. VBAK. but i can't find an option to do this in ESR,

could you help me on this? or it's not possible to do this, i have to insert element one by one manually.

Thanks in advance!

SAP Process Orchestration

entry.title: PO7.5 Node functions
entry.content:
Hi ,

I am using PO7.5. I am new to node functions and need some help.

Say,I have 3 input fields(ip1, ip2, ip3) and one output field(op1).

I want to achieve below functionality with node functions or UDF. Can anyone guide me on this?

If IP1 or IP2 is initial then OP1 = IP3.

If IP1 is not initial and IP2 is not initial then OP1 = concate(IP1, IP2).

Do i need to create Custome function or with simple node functions is it possible?

Thanks,
Pavan.

entry.title: Please teach me how to Mapping Function [counter]
entry.content:
Hellow, Every one.
My Name is Shuto Suzuki.

Please teach me how to Mapping Function [counter].


When I actually tried setting the mapping definition as above, the output result for ① was 202.
This can be understood by saying,
　``The value of [Increment] was added to the value of [Initial Value] for the number of calls of [counter].''


However, regarding ②, in parts (1) and (2) of the image,
I thought that both would be 420 because "counter" was called twice,
but the result was 210 for both.

Not only the above example ,even other simple mapping examples is okey.
Please teach me about to know how the "counter" function works.

example)
With this kind of mapping, [Initial Value] is this value and [Increment] is this value, so it is calculated like this and the output result is like this.  etc

Best Regards.

entry.title: Problem with REST sender
entry.content:
Hi

I have an "InterfaceDetermination did not yield any actual interface" with my REST sender. I really cannot get it. 

Log says:

But as i understand my setup i has an Integrated  Configuration that matches exactly this:

What am i missing here?

entry.title: Fetch mails from Outlook365 from SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please could someone let me know how to connect to outlook365 and read mails via SAP PO.

Thanks and Regards,

Sudarshan

entry.title: how to change id of a software component from the SLD - PO PI
entry.content:
Hi,

how do I change the id of a software component from the SLD?

For example

I need to create a new software component, but I need to associate a specific id


Thank you

entry.title: Help with NoClassDefFoundError for com/sap/aii/security/lib/exception/SecurityException in EJB Proj
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am encountering a NoClassDefFoundError for com/sap/aii/security/lib/exception/SecurityException in my EJB project deployed on SAP NetWeaver. Here are the details of my setup and the issue:

Project Setup:

  • I have an EAR project that includes an EJB module and a Dynamic Web Project (DWP).
  • I am using Eclipse for development and SAP PO (Process Orchestration) for deployment.

Issue: When my EJB bean executes the line following line
SAPSecurityResources secRes = SAPSecurityResources.getInstance();
I get the error NoClassDefFoundError: com/sap/aii/security/lib/exception/SecurityException

Here's the full stack trace for the error:

 

javax.ejb.EJBException: nested exception is: java.lang.RuntimeException: java.lang.NoClassDefFoundError: com/sap/aii/security/lib/exception/SecurityException
java.lang.RuntimeException: java.lang.NoClassDefFoundError: com/sap/aii/security/lib/exception/SecurityException
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.RequestInvocationContext.proceedFinal(RequestInvocationContext.java:99)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:166)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_StatesTransition.invoke(Interceptors_StatesTransition.java:19)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:179)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_Resource.invoke(Interceptors_Resource.java:50)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:179)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_Transaction.doWorkWithAttribute(Interceptors_Transaction.java:37)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_Transaction.invoke(Interceptors_Transaction.java:21)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:179)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_MethodRetry.invoke(Interceptors_MethodRetry.java:46)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:179)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:191)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_StatelessInstanceGetter.invoke(Interceptors_StatelessInstanceGetter.java:23)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:179)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_SecurityCheck.invoke(Interceptors_SecurityCheck.java:25)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:179)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.Interceptors_ExceptionTracer.invoke(Interceptors_ExceptionTracer.java:17)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.AbstractInvocationContext.proceed(AbstractInvocationContext.java:179)
at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.DefaultInvocationChainsManager.startChain(DefaultInvocationChainsManager.java:138)

at com.sap.engine.services.ejb3.runtime.impl.DefaultEJBProxyInvocationHandler.invoke(DefaultEJBProxyInvocationHandler.java:99)
at com.sun.proxy.$Proxy3585.loadCertificate(Unknown Source)

at javax.servlet.http.HttpServlet.service(HttpServlet.java:734)

... 63 more

[library:jaxr_api]
Resources:
/usr/sap/PO1/J00/j2ee/cluster/apps/sap.com/myclient2partyLdap-ear-jp/app_libraries_container/lib/com.sap.aii.af.svc.filter.jar
/usr/sap/PO1/J00/j2ee/cluster/apps/sap.com/myclient2partyLdap-ear-jp/app_libraries_container/lib/com.sap.aii.af.svc.facade.jar
/usr/sap/PO1/J00/j2ee/cluster/apps/sap.com/myclient2partyLdap-ear-jp/app_libraries_container/lib/com.sap.aii.af.cpa.svc.filter.jar
/usr/sap/PO1/J00/j2ee/cluster/apps/sap.com/myclient2partyLdap-ear-jp/app_libraries_container/lib/com.sap.security_2.0.0.201214143317.jar
---------------------------------------------------------------
at com.sap.engine.boot.loader.MultiParentClassLoader.loadClass(MultiParentClassLoader.java:280)
at com.sap.engine.boot.loader.MultiParentClassLoader.loadClass(MultiParentClassLoader.java:249)
... 69 more

According to help.sap.com/PI/com/sap/aii/af/service/resource/SAPSecurityResources documentation, only com.sap.aii.af.svc.facade jar file is needed to make an instance of SAPSecurityResources object if you want to access KeyStoreManager and manage certificates, but somehow my code doesn't run.

Steps Taken:
  1. I have added the necessary JAR files to the EAR project's lib directory.
  2. I have ensured these JAR files are included in the EAR deployment assembly.

I have also added these JAR files to the EJB and Dynamic Web Projects' build paths in Eclipse.

Any help would be greatly appreciated. 


other Questions:asdad

  1. Is it sufficient to add the required JARs only to the EAR lib directory, or do they need to be explicitly referenced in the EJB and DWP projects' deployment assembly?

P.S I have accessed keystore views in java mappings using the exact same api but in the setup mentioned above I get the NoClassDefFoundError.

Thanks
Syed Ijlal Ayub

entry.title: converting XML fields into single json string
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

My scenario : proxy <--> PI <---> rest         mode of communication : Synchronous

i have a requirement, i am getting 3 xml fields as shown in the below  in the input payload need to convert them as a single json string. could you please help on this to write an XSLT code. i am new to this xslt code.

input fields : 

client_id

client_secret

grant_type

 

Thanks in advance.

 

Best Regards,

Nagaraju

entry.title: SAP NWBPM calling parameterized mapping from ESR
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I have imported a parameterized interface mapping from ESR into NWBPM (7.5 SP25) and I am calling it inside an automated activity. However I can't find a way to pass a value to the parameter. On the Input mapping tab I can fill the input structure fine but no option for the parameter. Please point me in the right direction!

Thanks

entry.title: IDOC structure not displaying in Xpath condition editor
entry.content:
IDOC structure is not displaying in Xpath condition editor for only 1 Idoc and only in production environment when we want to add a condition on the receiver interface tab. This was working before because there were conditions  set on the receiver itself. However if we want to add a new condition there it also does not show the Idoc structure in the xpath editor on the receiver tab.

The  Idoc is visible in the Business System in the Sender tab and the SWCV is visible in the tab Other Attributes.

The Idoc version is the same as in development and quality where this problem does not occur. SLD cache has been refreshed many times, without any effect. CPA cache only delta because this is in production.

I have read the different questions and answers on this forum for the same problem. Unfortunately those solutions did not help

Solved: IDOC structure not displaying in Xpath condition e... - SAP Community

Solved: IDoc Message Structure Missing from Condition Edit... - SAP Community

Solved: Idoc structure not displying in XPATH at Receiver ... - SAP Community

I have two questions:

1. Does anyone have another idea what this could be and how to fix it ? Would a restart solve it ?

2.  If we add the condition for the receiver interface manually will it work ? I see contradictionary statements about this manually adding conditions.

Any suggestion is welcome. It is a change for production so it is kind of urgent. Thanks.

Regards,

Peter

entry.title: message in sxi_monitor in ECC status log version but in PI is sucessfully
entry.content:
Dear expert

I am facing a strange issue in my synchronous scenario: ECC(proxy)->PI->BPM(soap). 

 Some of the messages for this scenario are stuck in sxi_monitor with status "Log Version" (grey circle sign). Inside sxi_monitor traces, there is no response. but I can see everything has processed successfully in PI and already responded to the message to ECC.

I suspected it was because the parameter timeout in PI was too short. So I set a timeout of 5 minutes in channel.But this situation still happens. From the PI log, the message is responded  within 1 minute.

Please help how should i proceed. I have already spent half a day searching over SDN and other sites....

Thanks very much.

 

##SAP Process Orchestration #SAP S
